title: Marbella Luxury Yacht Hire Weekend: Costs, Boats & Tips 2026
html:
For a luxury weekend in Marbella, chartering a motor or sailing yacht from Puerto Banús is the quintessential way to explore the Costa del Sol. Prices typically start from EUR 1,500 for a half day on a brand like Sunseeker, and you can browse options at yacht charter Marbella on BoatHire24.

How much does it cost to rent a luxury yacht in Marbella?

A half-day charter on a 40, 50ft motor yacht starts from around EUR 1,200, while a full day on a crewed 60ft-plus Sunseeker or Azimut ranges from EUR 3,500 to 8,000. Prices vary by season, boat age, and whether fuel and crew gratuity are included. Most operators quote in EUR and require a deposit of 30, 50 per cent.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Marbella?

For bareboat rental of a motor yacht over 15 metres you need a Spanish recreational boating licence or an ICC endorsed for CEVNI, but many luxury charters include a skipper. If you choose a crewed charter, common for luxury weekends, the licensed captain handles all navigation, so no personal licence is required for you or your guests.

Tip: Book a skipper from the outset even if you hold a licence; they know the local anchorages between Marbella and Calahonda and will secure the best table at a chiringuito for lunch.

Where to set off in Marbella

Most luxury charters depart from Puerto Banús, the glamorous marina lined with superyachts and designer boutiques. Other options include the Marbella Marina (Club de Mar) near the old town, and the smaller port at Cabopino for quick access to the dunes of Artola. A popular day cruise heads east toward the exclusive enclave of Estepona or west to the fishing village of Fuengirola. Weekend itineraries often include an overnight anchorage in Marbella Bay or a run across to Gibraltar Strait mouths.

Which boat to rent for your Marbella weekend

  1. Sunseeker Predator 72, best for a stylish big-group day trip; 12 guests; from EUR 5,500 per day. See the Sunseeker Predator 72 listing for full specs.
  2. Azimut 58 Flybridge, ideal for a couples’ weekend; 10 guests; from EUR 4,000 half day.
  3. Lagoon 450 Catamaran, perfect for a stable, spacious family charter; 10 guests; from EUR 3,200 full day.
  4. Fairline Phantom 43, a classic choice for a sunset cruise with 8 guests; from EUR 1,500 half day.
  5. Axopar 37 T-Top, great for an active weekend with watersports; 8 guests; from EUR 1,200 half day.

Cost breakdown for a luxury weekend

  • Shared sunset tour on a 12-metre motor yacht: from EUR 120 per person, 2 hours.
  • Two-hour half-day on a small motorboat (Hobie or RIB, no licence): from EUR 400 for 6 people.
  • Full-day catamaran charter (Lagoon 450, crewed): from EUR 3,200 for 12 guests, including light lunch and drinks.
  • Full weekend (two days) on a 25-metre crewed Azimut or Sunseeker: from EUR 12,000 for 8, 10 guests, fuel not always included.

At a glance

  • Price band: EUR 1,200, 12,000
  • Peak months: June, July, August, September
  • Typical trip length: half day (4 h) or full day (8 h)
  • Guest capacity: 6, 12
  • Currency: EUR
  • Licence needed: Only for bareboat; crewed charters require no licence

Questions about boat rental in Marbella

Can I take the yacht to Gibraltar for a day trip?

Yes, but you must clear customs and immigration at the port of Gibraltar; many operators permit this if you book a full-day charter, but it adds about 10 nautical miles each way from Puerto Banús.

What is the cancellation policy for luxury charters?

Most operators require 48- to 72-hour notice for a full refund, though Force Majeure weather cancellations are typically handled without penalty.

Are meals and drinks included in the price?

For most crewed charters a basic selection of soft drinks, beer, and a light lunch is standard; premium wine or Champagne and gourmet catering can be added at extra cost, often EUR 35, 50 per person.

Is it possible to rent a boat in Marbella without a deposit?

No, every booking on this marketplace requires a deposit via secure payment; the amount is held and returned after the trip if no damage or extra hours occur.

Whether you are treating clients to a weekend of sun deck luxury or gathering friends for a sunset sail, booking through BoatHire24 ensures a secure, vetted experience across hundreds of boats in Marbella and beyond. If you own a boat in the Costa del Sol, you can also list your vessel and become a host on our platform.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Marbella and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
